dataset: AdminPilot Top 50 US Vehicle Maintenance Schedules
notes: Variant-split supplement to Phase 2. Covers only the 33 vehicles flagged for split in Phase 3.
Each record is a FULL vehicle record in the flat vehicles array, matching the Phase 2 schema.
The original un-split ids are retired and should not appear in production data.
Maintenance items are carried from the source where available; variant-exclusive items are added, variant-exclusive items are removed as appropriate.

vehicles.source: 2021 Toyota Tacoma Owner's Manual (same as unified record)

maintenance.notes: 2.7L-specific oil capacity and filter; do not exceed 10,000 miles or 12 months.

maintenance.service: Tire rotation, wear inspection, and tread depth measurement

interval.logic: perform at each oil change interval

maintenance.notes: Rotate tires at each oil change interval indicated by the multi-information display.

interval.logic: perform at each oil change interval

maintenance.notes: Inspect pads, shoes, rotors, drums, linings, hoses, parking brake, and fluid level.
Replace more frequently in dusty conditions.
Inspect or replace per severe-use conditions as outlined in the maintenance specifications.
2.7L plug interval differs from 3.5L and from any supercharged or heavier-duty engine instructions.
Automatic-transmission variant only.
Apply to 4WD models. Do not present as normal for 2WD.
Conditional severe-use item; normal intervals are mileage based.
